ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient */,
  "referral_source" TEXT /* Source of patient referral */,
  "target" TEXT /* Target diagnosis or treatment outcome */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Insurance provider of the patient */,
  "primary_care_physician" TEXT /* Primary care physician of the patient */,
  "medical_history_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient's medical history record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_medical_history_id FOREIGN KEY ("medical_history_id") REFERENCES medical_history ("medical_history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thyroxine_medication" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient taking the medication */,
  "on_thyroxine" TEXT /* Whether the patient is currently taking thyroxine */,
  "query_on_thyroxine" TEXT /* Whether there is a query regarding thyroxine use */,
  "thyroxine_dosage" REAL /* Dosage of thyroxine taken by the patient */,
  "thyroxine_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of thyroxine treatment */,
  "thyroxine_end_date" TEXT /* End date of thyroxine treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thyroxine_medication_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "antithyroid_medication" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient taking the medication */,
  "on_antithyroid_medication" TEXT /* Whether the patient is currently taking antithyroid medication */,
  "antithyroid_medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the antithyroid medication */,
  "antithyroid_dosage" REAL /* Dosage of antithyroid medication taken by the patient */,
  "antithyroid_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of antithyroid medication treatment */,
  "antithyroid_end_date" TEXT /* End date of antithyroid medication treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_antithyroid_medication_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thyroid_surgery" (
  "surgery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each surgery record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who underwent surgery */,
  "thyroid_surgery" TEXT /* Whether the patient has undergone thyroid surgery */,
  "surgery_date" TEXT /* Date of thyroid surgery */,
  "surgery_type" TEXT /* Type of thyroid surgery performed */,
  "surgery_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of thyroid surgery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("surgery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thyroid_surgery_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "I131_treatment" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who received treatment */,
  "I131_treatment" TEXT /* Whether the patient has received I131 treatment */,
  "treatment_date" TEXT /* Date of I131 treatment */,
  "treatment_dose" REAL /* Dose of I131 administered */,
  "treatment_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of I131 treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_I131_treatment_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thyroid_queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient with the query */,
  "query_hypothyroid" TEXT /* Whether there is a query regarding hypothyroidism */,
  "query_hyperthyroid" TEXT /* Whether there is a query regarding hyperthyroidism */,
  "query_date" TEXT /* Date the query was made */,
  "query_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the query */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thyroid_queries_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical condition record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient with the condition */,
  "sick" TEXT /* Whether the patient is currently sick */,
  "pregnant" TEXT /* Whether the patient is pregnant */,
  "lithium" TEXT /* Whether the patient is taking lithium */,
  "goitre" TEXT /* Whether the patient has goitre */,
  "tumor" TEXT /* Whether the patient has a tumor */,
  "hypopituitary" TEXT /* Whether the patient has hypopituitarism */,
  "psych" TEXT /* Whether the patient has a psychological condition */,
  "diabetes" TEXT /* Whether the patient has diabetes */,
  "hypertension" TEXT /* Whether the patient has hypertension */,
  "asthma" TEXT /* Whether the patient has asthma */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_conditions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lab_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab test record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who underwent the test */,
  "TSH_measured" TEXT /* Whether TSH level was measured */,
  "TSH" REAL /* TSH level */,
  "T3_measured" TEXT /* Whether T3 level was measured */,
  "T3" REAL /* T3 level */,
  "TT4_measured" TEXT /* Whether TT4 level was measured */,
  "TT4" REAL /* TT4 level */,
  "T4U_measured" TEXT /* Whether T4U level was measured */,
  "T4U" REAL /* T4U level */,
  "FTI_measured" TEXT /* Whether FTI level was measured */,
  "FTI" REAL /* FTI level */,
  "TBG_measured" TEXT /* Whether TBG level was measured */,
  "TBG" REAL /* TBG level */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the lab test was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_tests_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_history" (
  "medical_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical history record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient with the medical history */,
  "family_history" TEXT /* Family medical history of the patient */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Allergies of the patient */,
  "previous_surgeries" TEXT /* Previous surgeries of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medical_history_id")
)
